name: Mark Badham
title: Head Coach & Founder
bio: Mark is the founder of The Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Academy and co-founder of the British Army Brazilian Jiu Jitsu team. Training since 2011, Mark has competed in prestigious international competitions and brings a wealth of technical knowledge and competitive experience to every class.
lineage: Mitsuyo Maeda → Carlos Gracie → Helio Gracie → Carlos Gracie Jr → Roger Gracie → Andy Roberts → Mark Badham

name: Chris Rowlands
title: Gi Coach
bio: Chris Rowlands has been training in Brazilian Jiu Jitsu since 2013 and has had the opportunity to travel and learn from world-class instructors around the globe. He brings a thoughtful, concept-driven approach to his coaching, focusing on principles that translate across all aspects of Jiu Jitsu. Chris is passionate about passing on his knowledge and is a strong advocate for the physical and mental benefits of training, while remaining committed to being a lifelong student of the art.
lineage: Mitsuyo Maeda → Carlos Gracie → Helio Gracie → Carlos Gracie Jr → Roger Gracie → Andy Roberts / Dominic Debiec → Chris Rowlands

name: Tyler Hughes
title: No-Gi Coach
bio: Tyler Hughes is the head No-Gi coach at The Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Academy. A purple belt who competes in both gi and no-gi, Tyler brings a dynamic, modern approach to grappling with a strong focus on technique, concepts, and ecological learning
lineage: Mitsuyo Maeda → Carlos Gracie → Helio Gracie → Carlos Gracie Jr → Roger Gracie → Andy Roberts → Mark Badham → Tyler Hughes
